# start

```go
import "github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/internal/commands/start"
```

Package start contains reusable command logic for the start workflow.

<a name="IssueLinkClient"></a>
## type [IssueLinkClient](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/commands/start/link_resolver.go#L12-L16>)

IssueLinkClient is the subset of tracker behavior required for link resolution.

```go
type IssueLinkClient interface {
    IsValidIssueID(id string) bool
    GetIssue(id string) (*tracker.Issue, error)
    SearchIssues(projectKey string, query string, issueTypes []tracker.IssueType, limit int) ([]tracker.Issue, error)
}
```

<a name="ResolveIssueLinkErrors"></a>
## type [ResolveIssueLinkErrors](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/commands/start/link_resolver.go#L31-L37>)

ResolveIssueLinkErrors allows the caller to inject localized/domain errors.

```go
type ResolveIssueLinkErrors struct {
    QueryRequired func() error
    SearchIssues  func(error) error
    LinkNotFound  func(string) error
    LinkAmbiguous func(string) error
    Cancelled     func() error
}
```

<a name="ResolveIssueLinkOptions"></a>
## type [ResolveIssueLinkOptions](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/commands/start/link_resolver.go#L19-L28>)

ResolveIssueLinkOptions configures interactive/non\-interactive issue\-link resolution.

```go
type ResolveIssueLinkOptions struct {
    ProjectKey       string
    RawQuery         string
    AllowedTypes     []tracker.IssueType
    Interactive      bool
    PickerTitle      string
    SelectIssueLink  func([]tracker.Issue, string) (*tracker.Issue, error)
    PromptRefineLink func(currentQuery string) (string, bool, error)
    Errors           ResolveIssueLinkErrors
}
```

<a name="RunPickerFunc"></a>
## type [RunPickerFunc](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/commands/start/picker.go#L11>)

RunPickerFunc runs a picker with a title and item list.

```go
type RunPickerFunc func(title string, items []ui.PickerItem) (*ui.PickerItem, error)
```

<a name="WorkflowDeps"></a>
## type [WorkflowDeps](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/commands/start/workflow.go#L41-L50>)

WorkflowDeps defines dependencies required by start workflow orchestration.

```go
type WorkflowDeps struct {
    NormalizeFlags        func(*cobra.Command, string) error
    NewJiraClient         func(*viper.Viper) (jira.Jira, error)
    CreateNewIssue        func(WorkflowEmitter, jira.Jira) (*jira.Issue, error)
    SelectIssueWithPicker func([]tracker.Issue) (*tracker.Issue, error)
    RunWithSpinner        func(func(WorkflowEmitter) error) error
    ResolveIssueAssignee  func(WorkflowEmitter, jira.Jira, string)
    NewGitClient          func(*viper.Viper, *chan string) (git.Git, error)
    StashChanges          func(WorkflowEmitter, git.Git) error
}
```

<a name="WorkflowEmitter"></a>
## type [WorkflowEmitter](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/commands/start/workflow.go#L33-L38>)

WorkflowEmitter defines the status logging operations used by this workflow.

```go
type WorkflowEmitter interface {
    Info(emoji string, key i18n.Key, args ...any)
    Verbose(key i18n.Key, args ...any)
    Debug(key i18n.Key, args ...any)
    DebugRaw(message string)
}
```

<a name="WorkflowOptions"></a>
## type [WorkflowOptions](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/commands/start/workflow.go#L19-L22>)

WorkflowOptions contains flag values used by start workflow execution.

```go
type WorkflowOptions struct {
    Title    string
    NoBranch bool
}
```

<a name="WorkflowResult"></a>
## type [WorkflowResult](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/commands/start/workflow.go#L25-L30>)

WorkflowResult contains the structured result for non\-interactive execution paths.

```go
type WorkflowResult struct {
    Issue      *jira.Issue
    BranchName string
    Created    bool
    Err        error
}
```

<a name="WorkflowRunner"></a>
## type [WorkflowRunner](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/commands/start/workflow.go#L53-L58>)

WorkflowRunner executes start workflow steps using configured dependencies.

```go
type WorkflowRunner struct {
    Config   *viper.Viper
    Options  WorkflowOptions
    Localize func(i18n.Key, ...any) string
    Deps     WorkflowDeps
}
```

<a name="WorkflowRunner.RunInteractive"></a>
### func \(WorkflowRunner\) [RunInteractive](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/commands/start/workflow.go#L69>)

```go
func (r WorkflowRunner) RunInteractive(cmd *cobra.Command, issueID string) error
```

RunInteractive executes the interactive start flow.

<a name="WorkflowRunner.RunWithResult"></a>
### func \(WorkflowRunner\) [RunWithResult](<https://github.com/tagoro9/fotingo/blob/main/internal/commands/start/workflow.go#L94>)

```go
func (r WorkflowRunner) RunWithResult(cmd *cobra.Command, statusCh *chan string, issueID string, out WorkflowEmitter) WorkflowResult
```

RunWithResult executes the non\-interactive start flow used by JSON mode.
